title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXCIII. Games.
content:
Intery, mintery, cutery-corn,
        Apple seed and apple thorn;
        Wine, brier, limber-lock,
        Five geese in a flock,
        Sit and sing by a spring,
        O-U-T, and in again.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXCIII. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
